# implot

[ImPlot](https://github.com/epezent/implot) plotting extension for ImGui (disk health charts, sparklines).

## Used sources

- `implot.cpp`, `implot_items.cpp`, `implot_demo.cpp`

Include path: `third_party/implot`

Requires Dear ImGui from [`../imgui`](../imgui/README.md).
